mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT M.perms FROM User ur LEFT JOIN Roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN Roles_Groups rg ON r.id = rg.role_id LEFT JOIN Groups_Permissions GP on rg.group_id = GP.group_id LEFT JOIN Permissions M ON GP.permission_id = M.id WHERE ur.id = #{userid} AND r.status = 1 AND M.status = 1
SELECT DISTINCT M.perms FROM Routes R LEFT JOIN Permissions M ON R.perm = M.id WHERE R.status=true AND R.path=#{path} AND M.status=true
SELECT id, name, perms, status FROM Permissions left join Groups_Permissions GP on id=GP.permission_id WHERE GP.group_id=#{groupId}
